description: A sample plan with missing/vague acceptance criteria to test task-checker precondition handling.
goal: Ensure task-checker refuses to guess when tasks are not objectively auditable.
architecture: Some tasks intentionally omit validation_criteria or include vague non-verifiable criteria.

tasks.title: Refactor parsing module
tasks.description: Refactor parser internals to be cleaner.

tasks.title: Add config file support
tasks.description: Support reading configuration from a file.

tasks.title: Add tests
validation_criteria: At least one success test asserts returned config structure
At least one failure test asserts error type/message for invalid config
